name: Relebactam
description: Relebactam has been used in trials studying the treatment of Infectious Disease.

interactions.name: BCG vaccine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of BCG vaccine can be decreased when used in combination with Relebactam.

interactions.name: Picosulfuric acid
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Picosulfuric acid can be decreased when used in combination with Relebactam.
